context_notes: Plans 07-01/02/03 are COMPLETE (Express removed, CSP enforcing, RLS/signed-URL probe PASS, SEC-03 grep-gate PASS). Only 07-04 remains to close Phase 07 (the milestone-gating audit). KEY GOTCHA: Task 1's verify gate runs `npm audit --omit=dev` which HIDES the dev-only vitest CVE — so the package.json `devDependencies.vitest` version string (must be ^4+) is the authoritative confirmation the major bump shipped, NOT the audit exit code. The vitest 4 upgrade left noisy `useToastContext`/provider error logs in the test output but the suite is GREEN — do not be alarmed. 07-SECURITY.md must mirror 03-SECURITY.md structure; gsd-secure-phase 07 BLOCKS if threats_open > 0. Prior HANDOFF.json was a stale Phase 06 handoff (now-closed) and was overwritten.
